gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/362)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/362)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ نَقْشِ خَاتَمِهِ وَ خَاتَمِ أَبِيهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ نَقْشُ خَاتَمِي مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ لَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ وَ نَقْشُ خَاتَمِ أَبِي حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ وَ هُوَ الَّذِي كُنْتُ أَتَخَتَّمُ بِهِ .

en.hubeali: From him, form his father, from Yunus Bin Abdul Rahman who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> about the engraving on his<sup>asws</sup> ring and the ring of his<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup>. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The engraving on my<sup>asws</sup> ring is: “Whatever Allah<sup>azwj</sup> so Desires. There is no Strength except by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>”; and the engraving of the ring of my father<sup>asws</sup> is: “Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is Sufficient”, and it is which I (the narrator) used to wear with’.
en.sarwar: 5. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from Yunus ibn ‘Abd al-Rahman who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the engraving on his ring and the ring of his father. He (the Imam) said, ‘The engraving on my ring says, ‘It is whatever Allah wants and there is no power except the power of Allah’ and the engraving on the ring of my father said, ‘Allah is sufficient for me’ and it is what I used for my ring.’”
